scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,orchestrator,executor -c auto "pnpm --filter @lantern/web dev" "pnpm --filter @lantern/orchestrator dev" "pnpm --filter @lantern/executor dev"
scripts.agent:live: pnpm --filter @lantern/contracts build && pnpm --filter @lantern/terminal-ui build && tsx scripts/agent-live.ts
scripts.agent:paper: pnpm --filter @lantern/contracts build && pnpm --filter @lantern/terminal-ui build && tsx scripts/agent-paper.ts
scripts.agent:test: pnpm --filter @lantern/contracts build && pnpm --filter @lantern/db build && pnpm --filter @lantern/terminal-ui build && tsx scripts/live-test.ts
